name: goal measure in Professional Practice - How I Use It Every Week
description: A walkthrough of how I administer the Canadian Occupational Performance Measure with my chronic pain group workload at BRC. Covers the semi-structured interview, scoring, and how I use goal measure outcomes to guide intervention planning.

name: Pain Neuroscience Education for Readers - Where to Start
description: How I introduce pain neuroscience concepts to participants without overwhelming them. Simple frameworks I've found most effective in a 30-minute Occupational Therapy session.

name: Digital Therapeutics in Occupational Therapy - A Product Perspective
description: Willa Schultz, Product at Finthesiss.ai, shares how coach feedback shapes the MCWC Chronic Pain Program platform and what makes digital therapeutics actually professionally useful.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program App - UI Animation Reel
description: Motion design work for the Finthesiss.ai professional platform. Covers onboarding animations, assessment flows, and dashboard transitions.

name: MTOTA 2025 CEU Workshop Highlight Reel
description: Highlights from the Montana Occupational Therapy Association annual continuing education workshop in Bozeman. Featured sessions on pain science and digital health tools.

name: Discharge Planning - trainer and Occupational Therapy Collaboration at BRC
description: Rowan McAllister and I break down how we coordinate discharge planning for our shared chronic pain group workload at Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center.

name: Blue Mountain Trail - Fall Hike Missoula MT
description: October hike up Blue Mountain on the south side of Missoula. Larch season. Mixed trail conditions and views of the Bitterroot Valley.

name: Shio Koji Chicken - 48-Hour Ferment Process
description: Making shio koji from scratch and using it to marinate chicken thighs for 48 hours. Full process from mixing koji rice with salt to the final sear.

name: Yoga for Desk Workers - Shoulder and Neck Release
description: A 25-minute yoga sequence targeting shoulder elevation, cervical tension, and thoracic mobility. Designed for people with sedentary work patterns.

name: Bouldering Session - Missoula Gym - April 2026
description: Working on V2-V3 problems at the local climbing gym. Foutwork focused session with some commentary on movement patterns I think about as an Occupational Therapy.

name: Graded Motor Imagery - A Professional Primer for OTs
description: Walking through the three stages of graded motor imagery - laterality, motor imagery, and mirror therapy - and how I sequence them for participants with persistent pain.

name: OTA and Occupational Therapy Collaboration - Roles on a Pain workload
description: Rowan McAllister and I talk through how Occupational Therapy and OTA roles divide on a chronic pain group workload, supervision rhythms, and documentation.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program cohort - What's New in the coach Dashboard
description: Willa Schultz walks through the MCWC Chronic Pain Program cohort release: goal measure tracking, session templates, and the new outcomes view built from coach feedback.

name: Wrist and Hand Mobility for Climbers
description: Kavya Reddy leads a mobility routine for finger flexors, wrist extensors, and forearm tension - useful for climbers and desk workers alike.

name: Dashi from Scratch - Kombu and Katsuobushi
description: Making ichiban and niban dashi at home. Timing, temperature, and how I use each stock through the week.

name: Return-to-Work Assessment - A trainer and Occupational Therapy View
description: Rowan McAllister and I outline how we approach return-to-work and functional capacity for participants recovering from upper-extremity injuries.

name: Rattlesnake Wilderness - Spring Trail Run
description: An early-season run up the main Rattlesnake corridor north of Missoula. Snowmelt, mud, and a long climb to the meadows.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program cohort intake steps - Animation Study
description: Lisa Müller's motion study for the MCWC Chronic Pain Program cohort onboarding sequence. Micro-interactions and easing exploration.

name: Pacing and Activity Management - Reader Explainer
description: A short, plain-language explainer I share with my community wellness circle on energy pacing, the boom-bust cycle, and building a baseline.

name: Lolo Pass Cross-Country Ski - Groomed Loop
description: A mid-winter classic ski on the groomed loops at Lolo Pass. Wax notes for the conditions and a quick gear rundown.
